issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Only one realistic code example is provided, but two or more are required.

scenarios.name: github-issue-slack-notify
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B does not use ComposioToolSet or the required tool calls.

scenarios.name: setup-github-oauth-and-crewai-agent
scenarios.rationale: Response A uses the Composio toolset and gets GitHub tools, covering more rubric items, while Response B omits the required toolset calls and role specification.
